name: Rabat
description: The capital city of Morocco, blending modern culture with historical depth.

name: Casablanca
description: The economic hub and modern metropolis, home to the iconic Hassan II Mosque.

name: Marrakesh
description: Known as the Red City, famous for its vibrant souks, gardens, and palaces.

name: Fes
description: The spiritual heart of Morocco, with the oldest medina in the world.

name: Meknes
description: One of the four imperial cities, known for its grand gates and Roman ruins.

name: Ouarzazate
description: The gateway to the Sahara Desert and a famous film location.

name: Chefchaouen
description: The Blue City, nestled in the Rif Mountains with its striking blue-washed buildings.

name: Essaouira
description: A breezy coastal town known for its medina and Gnaoua music festival.

name: Tangier
description: The white city on the Strait of Gibraltar, where Africa meets Europe.

name: Azilal
description: A city in the Central Atlas mountains, gateway to spectacular natural wonders.

name: Agadir
description: A major city on the Atlantic coast, known for its beaches and modern landmarks.

name: Ifrane
description: Known as 'Little Switzerland' for its European-style architecture and cedar forests.
